action.reasoning: Observation: best=0.6065 (success~0.89 proxy, full-test 0.6057 with ~0.873 success, ~338m dist; rooms weakest). Recent proxy ~0.85-0.87 but full evals sometimes hit KeyError on per_type (incomplete init for all env_types) or truncation (predict.py cut at run_evaluation). Analysis: Dijkstra (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) global target + next-hop on node graph is strong standard frontier planner (0 params, uses real ExplorationEnv+provided utilities/neighbors, fully contract compliant). Root cause=long code truncation + per_type aggregation fragility (not all keys always populated). New alpha=2.5/beta=1.2 from prior best + compact COMPLETE predict.py (full select_waypoint, robust config+glob map loading for 150-map test or 9-map proxy, per-ep try/except, strict per_type init with all 3 keys+success-only dist, exact JSON+exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S*300/d), no truncation risk). Decision: update to best prior params+v20, run train+predict (proxy>0.85 expected), submit_eval for official full-test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
